    C

    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Returns the contractor's base hourly rate.
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Calculates and returns the employee's estimated monthly pay.
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Calculates the estimated monthly pay for this employee.
    calculatePay() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Calculates the estimated monthly pay for this employee.
    calculatePay(int) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Calculates the estimated gross pay for a given number of months.
    Contractor - Class in HumanResources
    Represents a contractor employed on a fixed-term basis in the HR system.
    Contractor(String, String, String, double, LocalDate) - Constructor for class HumanResources.Contractor
    Constructs a new Contractor with all required engagement details.

    D

    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Displays all contractor details including hourly rate and contract end date to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Displays detailed information about this employee to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Displays full employee details, including annual salary, to standard output.
    displayInfo() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Displays all employee details including hourly rate, max weekly hours, and PTO to standard output.
    displayInfo(boolean) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Displays employee details, optionally including the annual salary.
    displayMainMenu() - Static method in class HumanResources.HRSystem
    Prints the main menu options to standard output.

    E

    Employee - Class in HumanResources
    Abstract base class representing a generic employee in the HR system.
    Employee(String, String, String) - Constructor for class HumanResources.Employee
    Constructs a new Employee with the specified identity information.

    F

    findEmployee(String) - Static method in class HumanResources.HRSystem
    Searches the employee roster for the employee with the given ID.
    FullTimeEmployee - Class in HumanResources
    Represents a full-time, salaried employee in the HR system.
    FullTimeEmployee(String, String, String, double, int, boolean) - Constructor for class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Constructs a new FullTimeEmployee with all required employment details.

    G

    getAnnualSalary() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Returns the employee's gross annual salary.
    getContractEndDate() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Returns the date on which this contractor's engagement ends.
    getDepartment() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Returns the department this employee belongs to.
    getEmployeeID() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Returns the unique employee ID.
    getHourlyRate() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Returns the contractor's hourly pay rate.
    getHourlyRate() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Returns the employee's hourly pay rate.
    getMaxHoursPerWeek() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Returns the maximum number of hours this employee may work per week.
    getName() - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Returns the employee's full name.
    getPTODays() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Returns the number of PTO days this employee has accrued.
    getPTODays() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Returns the number of PTO days this employee has accrued.

    H

    HRSystem - Class in HumanResources
    Console-based controller for the Human Resources management system.
    HumanResources - package HumanResources
     

    I

    isBenefitsEligible() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Returns whether this employee is eligible for benefits.

    P

    PartTimeEmployee - Class in HumanResources
    Represents a part-time, hourly employee in the HR system.
    PartTimeEmployee(String, String, String, double, int, int) - Constructor for class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Constructs a new PartTimeEmployee with all required employment details.

    S

    setAnnualSalary(double) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Updates the employee's annual salary.
    setBenefitsEligible(boolean) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Sets whether this employee is eligible for benefits.
    setContractEndDate(LocalDate) - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Updates the contract end date for this contractor.
    setDepartment(String) - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Sets the department for this employee.
    setEmployeeID(String) - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Sets the employee's ID.
    setHourlyRate(double) - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Updates the contractor's hourly pay rate.
    setHourlyRate(double) - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Updates the employee's hourly pay rate.
    setMaxHoursPerWeek(int) - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Updates the maximum weekly hours for this employee.
    setName(String) - Method in class HumanResources.Employee
    Sets the employee's full name.
    setPTODays(int) - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Updates the employee's accrued PTO days.
    setPTODays(int) - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Updates the employee's accrued PTO days.
    start() - Static method in class HumanResources.HRSystem
    Launches the HR system and runs the main interactive menu loop.

    T

    toString() - Method in class HumanResources.Contractor
    Returns a concise string representation of this contractor.
    toString() - Method in class HumanResources.FullTimeEmployee
    Returns a concise string representation of this full-time employee.
    toString() - Method in class HumanResources.PartTimeEmployee
    Returns a concise string representation of this part-time employee.
